patch.value: pm todos import: positional source arg silently ignored + folder-not-found error omits --folder flag (beads parity)

Repro (sandbox, pm-todos installed): 'pm todos import todos.md' accepts the positional, ignores it, and errors 'Todos source folder not found at .../.pm/todos' without mentioning the --folder flag. Compare pm beads import whose error says 'Use --file <path> or --file - for stdin'. Two fixes: (1) reject or honor the unexpected positional (an agent passing a file path gets no signal it was ignored); (2) include 'Use --folder <path>' in the folder-not-found guidance. Bonus: 'pm todos import --help' prints flags twice (Options section + Extension-provided flags section) — duplicated tokens.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented in feat/agent-ergonomics-cmd-suggestions-importer-ux. Root cause: importer/exporter commands dispatch through wrapProgramActionsForExtensionHandlers -> runActiveCommandHandler (handled=true short-circuits), bypassing the dynamic-action validateDynamicExtensionCommandInvocation, so unexpected positionals were silently ignored. Fixes: (1) wrappedActionHandler now rejects unexpected positionals for IMPORTER/EXPORTER command paths that declare no arguments (new isImporterOrExporterCommandPath gate keyed off registrations.importers/exporters; free-form registerCommand commands and arg-declaring commands like calendar are untouched). New collectLoosePositionalArgs (extension-command-options.ts) counts only true operands so leaked undeclared --flag tokens are not miscounted. (2) failure_hints now append to the too-many/missing-required arity errors; todos importer/exporter declare a 'Use --folder <path>' hint. (3) folder-not-found error in todos runtime.ts/.js now includes the --folder guidance. (4) Help dedup: extension flags registered as real options no longer ALSO render in a duplicate 'Extension-provided flags:' after-text (new buildResidualDynamicExtensionFlagHelp). Tests: in-process guard test in cli-main-errors.spec.ts, collectLoosePositionalArgs in main-loose-options.spec.ts, residual-help + arity-hint assertions, todos-extension.spec.ts folder-hint, integration acme/beads/todos help dedup. Docs: SDK.md importer positional contract. 100% coverage retained.
